model_output.summary: The video features a fitness influencer demonstrating dumbbell chest presses. The subject is clearly visible, well-lit, and the camera angle is stable, making it highly suitable for AI face replacement.
reasons: The subject is the sole focus of the video throughout.
The lighting is consistent and professional, aiding in high-quality AI generation.
The subject's face is clearly visible in almost all shots, with minimal obstruction.
The camera remains relatively static, which is ideal for stable face tracking and replacement.

best_segments.why: Clear, stable shot of the subject performing the exercise with good face visibility.
Subject is talking directly to the camera with a clear, unobstructed view of the face.
